meta.title: Reporting from the Frontline of the War in Ukraine
meta.description:
Please join Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Ken Weinstein for a discussion with Research Fellow James Barnett on his on-the-ground reporting from Ukraine and neighboring countries. Following two weeks inside Western and Southern Ukraine, Barnett details what he witnessed and how Ukrainian moral and unity stands strong in the face of the ongoing Russian invasion.

Watch on Hudson.org: https://www.hudson.org/events/2100-virtual-event-reporting-from-the-frontline-of-the-war-in-ukraine-42022
